synopsis:
Collecting issues from the Marvel Comics Star Wars (2015) Series
The epic run that continues bridging the gap between A NEW HOPE and THE EMPIRE STRIKES BACK!
The blockbuster first era of Star Wars’ return to Marvel concludes, as the complete runs of writers Kieron Gillen and Greg Pak are collected in one Death Star-sized Omnibus! Jedha was left in ruins when the Holy City was annihilated — now, as Queen Trios’ forces move in to strip what’s left, the rebels struggle to preserve the planet for its survivors! Leia and her allies seek to strengthen their forces, but can they liberate the water planet of Mon Cala? Or will all hope be lost at the hands of Darth Vader? With the Empire resurgent, and Vader on a ruthless hunt for Luke Skywalker, our heroes are forced on the run — but is romance in the air?
And can the beleaguered rebels find safe haven in the icy wastelands of Hoth?
Collecting:
Star Wars (2015) #38-75
Star Wars Annual (2016) #4
Star Wars: Empire Ascendant (2019) #1
title: Star Wars (2015): Gillen & Pak (Hardcover Omnibus)
